chat.title: AI Assistant
chat.welcomeDesc: Ask questions about your ERP data, get explanations, summaries, and suggestions. The assistant is advisory-only and cannot modify business records.
chat.disclaimer: AI responses are advisory-only. They cannot create, modify, or delete business records.
chat.noPermissionDesc: You do not have permission to use the AI Assistant.
chat.toolUnavailableDesc: Could not retrieve tool data for this request.
chat.untestedModelWarning: Untested model — response quality not verified
chat.clarificationPrompt: Please provide the requested details before any tool execution or proposal can continue.
chat.toolUseInProgress: Analyzing request and checking safe tools...
chat.quickTbPrompt: Show me the trial balance summary
chat.quickPnlPrompt: Generate a profit and loss report
chat.quickBsPrompt: What is the current balance sheet?

settings.title: AI Assistant Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure the AI provider and preferences for your company.
settings.analyticsDesc: Monitor AI assistant usage, performance, and recent activity.
settings.providerMockDesc: Returns simulated responses. Safe for local development. No API key needed.
settings.providerOpenAIDesc: Use any OpenAI-compatible API (OpenAI, Azure, etc.). Requires API key.
settings.providerOllamaDesc: Use a locally running Ollama instance. No cloud API key needed.
settings.presetMockDesc: Returns simulated responses. Safe for development. No API key needed.
settings.presetOpenaiDesc: GPT-4o and other OpenAI models. Requires an API key from platform.openai.com.
settings.presetOpenrouterDesc: Access 200+ models from multiple providers. Requires an OpenRouter API key.
settings.presetGroqDesc: Ultra-fast inference with Llama and Mixtral models. Requires a Groq API key.
settings.presetOllamaDesc: Run models locally on your machine. No cloud API key needed.
settings.presetCustomDesc: Use any OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Enter URL, model, and API key manually.
settings.endpointPresetLocked: Switch to "Custom" to edit the endpoint URL.
settings.enableAssistantDesc: When disabled, users cannot access the AI Assistant chat.
settings.apiKeySet: An API key is already configured. Enter a new one to replace it.
settings.contextDesc: Controls how much previous chat and ERP tool data is sent to the model. More context improves follow-up answers but may consume more tokens from your API key.
settings.contextModeMinimalDesc: Sends only a small recent context window. Best when cost control matters most.
settings.contextModeBalancedDesc: Keeps enough recent context for normal follow-up questions. Recommended default.
settings.contextModeDeepDesc: Sends more previous context and tool data for longer analysis threads. Uses more tokens.
settings.includePreviousToolResultsDesc: Lets follow-up questions reuse ERP data already fetched in this chat. Turn off for lower token usage.
settings.safetyDesc: The AI Assistant is designed to be advisory-only. It cannot create, update, delete, approve, post, or modify any business records. All business actions must go through the standard ERP module workflows with explicit user approval.
settings.apiKeySecurityDesc: API keys are stored server-side and never sent to the frontend. In production, keys should be encrypted at rest using a secrets manager (Vault, KMS, etc.). This is currently a TODO before production deployment.
settings.rateLimitingDesc: Requests are limited per day per company. Administrators can configure the daily request limit in the Provider tab.
settings.diagnosticsDesc: Tests the saved provider with safe prompts. No ERP data is sent.
settings.diagnosticsTokenNote: This sends a few provider requests and may consume tokens.
settings.saveBeforeDiagnostics: Save settings before testing this provider and model.
settings.noPermission: You do not have permission to view AI settings.

proposals.title: AI Proposals
proposals.subtitle: Review AI-generated proposals. No ERP data was changed.
proposals.sandboxBadge: AI Proposal · Sandbox · No ERP changes
proposals.noProposals: No proposals found. Ask the AI Assistant to create one!
proposals.provideMissing: Please provide this information to complete the proposal.
proposals.safetyMessage: This is an AI-generated proposal in the sandbox. Accepting it does NOT create real ERP records, post vouchers, or execute any business action. No financial data was changed.
proposals.executeUnavailableTitle: Execution is not available in this version
